subject: fix(theme): remove stale lofi/classic references after combo consolidation
body:
Print handler hardcoded 'lofi' as the light theme — changed to 'cmyk'.
Two comments still referenced old combos (classic, lofi/black, nature,
emerald/forest) — updated to reflect single Vivid (cmyk/night) combo.

Tags: theme, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: daisyui-migration
Semver: patch
